mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(1) as value FROM user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekStart, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekEnd, COUNT(1) as value FROM user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY weekStart, weekEnd ORDER BY weekStart

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as yearMonth, COUNT(1) as value FROM user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.user_id) FROM user u JOIN ai_task t2 ON u.id = t2.user_id WHERE u.created_at BETWEEN #{baseDate} AND DATE_ADD(#{baseDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND t2.created_at BETWEEN DATE_ADD(#{baseDate}, INTERVAL #{afterDays} DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(#{baseDate}, INTERVAL #{afterDays} DAY), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND u.is_deleted = false AND t2.is_deleted = false ) / ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{baseDate} AND DATE_ADD(#{baseDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = false ) * 100
